risks_and_notes: This is a synthetic EXAMPLE of a fully-composed credit proposal memo (auto-generated illustrative output), not a real customer document or bank policy.

Deliberately NOT registered as a tool on any Expert Agent's AgentToolGateway, so it can never appear in an ExpertFinding.evidence_refs or be cited as grounded compliance/credit/insurance/product evidence.
Intended use: format/structure reference for what an Operations-composed proposal document could look like, and as a manual search/reference asset for RM/specialist workspace tooling.
